title: Outcome tracking: factual-defect log + sensitivity-escape audit + feedback
context: Success for this project is measured in outcomes delivered to real beneficiaries, not PRs merged. M3 requires a maintained outcome-tracking log per delivered set. The project's success metrics include factual-defect rate (target: 0), sensitivity-handling escapes (target: 0), and partner/visitor usefulness feedback. Without a maintained log, the project cannot demonstrate its outcomes or detect and fix post-delivery errors. This task depends on delivery-001 providing the first delivered set.
objective: Establish and maintain an outcome-tracking log per delivered label set: capture display/adoption status, post-delivery factual defects (wrong date/maker/material/provenance discovered after delivery), sensitivity-handling escapes (sensitive item delivered without required escalated review), and partner/visitor usefulness feedback. Update the log after each delivery (delivery-001, scale-001) and after each partner check-in. Feed results back into PLAN.md success metrics.
acceptanceCriteria: Outcome-tracking log created as a structured dataset (YAML or JSON) with per-delivered-set records capturing: delivery date, partner museum name, object count, target language(s), adoption/display confirmation status, and a list of any post-delivery factual defects

Sensitivity-escape audit field included per set: counts of sensitive-heritage or contested-legal items that reached delivery without required escalated review (target: 0); any non-zero entry triggers an incident record
Partner feedback field: qualitative partner-reported usefulness (positive/neutral/negative with note); optional visitor-feedback reference if the partner collected it (no PII)
Log updated after each delivery event and each partner check-in; update process documented
Factual-defect rate and sensitivity-escape count visible and consistent with PLAN.md §4 success metrics; log feeds periodic project reporting
resources: C:/code/elyos/planning/projects/multilingual-museum-labels/PLAN.md (§4 Success metrics — outcome metrics table; §15 Sustainability)
multilingual-museum-labels-delivery-001 (first delivery — must be complete to populate the log)
output: data/outcomes-log.yaml — per-delivered-set outcome records including adoption status, defect log, sensitivity-escape audit, and partner feedback
